01 = One

M1324_STG_PRBL_PRU M1324 (M0460) Stage of Most Problematic Pressure Ulcer This field indicates the stage of the most problematic unhealed (observable) pressure ulcer. 01 = Stage I
02 = Stage II
03 = Stage III
04 = Stage IV
NA = NA - Patient has no pressure ulcers or no stageable pressure ulcers CHAR 2 x x x x x x
M1330_STAS_ULCR_PRSNT M1330 Stasis Ulcer Present This
